core_concept: 一個虛構的評論政策指南，以創意生物設計為核心視覺概念
composition_hint: 將抽象圖形與生物形狀融合於書籍與文件中，搭配燈光效果與數據圖表
potential_subjects: Abstract creature design with glowing patterns
Digital policy guide with cyberpunk elements
Eerie scene of a fictional creature
original_excerpt:
This policy is enforced by staff, at staff discretion. Don't try to enforce this policy yourself. You can report violations in
#site17
or through a PM to an active moderator or administrator (listed on
Meet The Staff
).
Rules
You must follow these rules when critiquing an author's work. See
Site Rules
for more.
Critique the work, not the author.
Do not make personal attacks on the author. Stick to criticizing their writing.
As an example, you can tell the author, "This needs work. The main idea'
